author: developeruche
content:
The `/new-payload-with-witness` proposal is an extension to the Engine API, introducing a new route that performs the same functionality as `engine_newPayloadV5`, but this time it is served over `HTTP` instead of `RPC`, avoiding the use of JSON serialization, which bloats witness sizes by roughly 2× due to encoding overhead. This method instead makes use of SSZ serialization.

The optimization introduced by these approaches significantly reduces the time required to perform both `"new-payload"` and `"debug_executionWitness"`. On `ethrex`, this currently takes ~8 seconds, ~22 seconds on Geth, and ~7 seconds on Reth for a block with a witness size of 500 MB (a worst-case scenario — impractical, but theoretically possible to construct). Using this new method, both operations ("new-payload" execution and witness retrieval) are performed in a single step, taking ~1.2 seconds on Ethrex and ~1.3 seconds on Reth.

We are hoping to introduce this as an experimental feature to these clients, similar to what was previously done for `debug_executionWitness`. This would be instrumental for [Optional Proofs](https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-8025).

A Reth and Ethrex PR have already been made in this regard and are ready for review:

- Reth: https://github.com/paradigmxyz/reth/pull/24617
- Ethrex: https://github.com/lambdaclass/ethrex/pull/6741
- Spec PR: https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/773

author: developeruche
content:
It is also important to note that there are ongoing discussions around introducing SSZ + HTTP to the Engine API more broadly, replacing JSON-RPC entirely, including proposals to combine `"new-payload"` execution and witness retrieval into a single operation. Once these discussions mature, we can standardize around a unified approach. However, this is a significant architectural change and will likely take time to reach consensus.

1. Engine: add Rest-SSZ spec
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/793

2. Add SSZ to Engine API
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/764

3. Proposal: opt-in witness retrieval via flag on existing engine methods
https://github.com/ethereum/execution-apis/pull/799


cc: <@806184091690598420> <@281967554572976128>
